[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10101011 5
1 00000110 2
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 01101001 4

70 07 00010000 1

61 16 10001011 4
72 27 00000100 1
